name: cct-instance-v1-agent-preliminary
_disclosure: AGENT-PRELIMINARY DATA. Labels in *.jsonl were heuristically generated by an LLM agent, not human-reviewed. The judge.json files at the referenced run_paths were also agent-fabricated and exist only in the maintainer's local runs/ archive (runs/ is gitignored — not committed in this PR; data_quality counts above describe the maintainer's local state at generation time, NOT what a fresh checkout can reproduce). Closes structural ACs of #52 only. Maintainer recovery: relabel the corpus by hand, run ./scripts/benchmark judge against runs/ to produce real judge.json files, then ./scripts/benchmark calibrate under a NEW --name for methodologically valid values.
